description_long: This is a compact, industrial-style shelving unit featuring three rectangular wooden shelves supported by a robust black metal frame. The frame is reinforced with diagonal cross-bracing on the sides and back, providing both structural stability and a distinctive visual pattern. The wood surfaces have a natural, slightly weathered finish with visible grain lines, adding a rustic touch to the otherwise utilitarian design. The metal frame is constructed from square tubing with exposed rivets at the joints, emphasizing its sturdy, functional character. The open design allows for easy access from the front and sides, making it suitable for storing or displaying items in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or lofts. There are no doors, drawers, or handles, and the shelves are fixed in place.
description: A sturdy, industrial-style shelving unit with three wooden shelves and a black metal frame featuring cross-bracing. The open design and visible wood grain give it a functional yet rustic appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open wooden shelves framed by a black metal structure with vertical supports and no cross-bracing visible.
description_view_1: Side or rear view highlighting the metal cross-bracing on each shelf level, adding structural support and visual interest.
description_view_2: Front view similar to view 0, displaying the open shelving and wood surfaces without cross-bracing.
description_view_3: Side or rear view mirroring view 1, with prominent metal cross-bracing visible across the back of the shelves.
